about.representation: FHIRPath invariants over the plain GRZ Datenkranz JSON (fhirpathpy). See kdk.invariants.json about.

invariants.human: Rare disease excludes panel/WES: donors.labData.libraryType in {wgs, wgs_lr}.
genomicDataCenterId must equal the receiving GRZ's own id.
noScopeJustification limited to the four patient-related reasons.
invariants.expression: donors.researchConsents.noScopeJustification.all($this in ('patient unable to consent'|'patient refuses to sign consent'|'patient did not return consent documents'|'other patient-related reason'))
